table.name: cr_projectmigration
table.description: Tracks the migration status of Dynamics 365 Project Operations projects between environments using the Schedule API

metadata.description: Custom table to track project migration progress, errors, and GUID mappings

attributes.name: cr_projectmigrationid
attributes.description: Unique identifier for this migration tracker record

attributes.name: cr_name
attributes.description: Auto-generated name combining source project name and timestamp

attributes.name: cr_sourceprojectid
attributes.description: GUID of the project in the source Dynamics 365 environment

validationRules.message: Must be a valid GUID format

attributes.name: cr_sourceprojectname
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the project in the source environment (msdyn_projectname)

attributes.name: cr_targetprojectid
attributes.description: GUID of the newly created project in the target Dynamics 365 environment (populated during import)

validationRules.message: Must be a valid GUID format

attributes.name: cr_status
attributes.description: Current status of the project migration workflow

optionSet.label: Pending
optionSet.description: Migration queued, waiting to be processed

optionSet.label: Exporting
optionSet.description: Power Automate Flow 1 is reading from source environment

optionSet.label: Exported
optionSet.description: Data has been successfully exported from source, stored in migration tracker

optionSet.label: Importing
optionSet.description: Power Automate Flow 2 is creating in target environment using Schedule API

optionSet.label: Completed
optionSet.description: Migration completed successfully - project now exists in target environment

optionSet.label: Failed
optionSet.description: Migration failed - check cr_errordetails for details

attributes.name: cr_errordetails
attributes.description: Detailed error message if migration failed (populated during exception handling)

attributes.name: cr_exportedon
attributes.description: Timestamp when the export phase completed successfully (Flow 1 finish time)

attributes.name: cr_importedon
attributes.description: Timestamp when the import phase completed successfully (Flow 2 finish time)

attributes.name: cr_taskcount
attributes.description: Total number of tasks found in the source project (populated during export)

attributes.name: cr_tasksimported
attributes.description: Number of tasks successfully created in target project (from OperationSet response)

attributes.name: cr_guidmappingjson
attributes.description: JSON object mapping source GUIDs to target GUIDs for project, tasks, team members (populated during import)

attributes.name: cr_exportedjson
attributes.description: Complete exported project data as JSON (all fields, tasks, team members, dependencies, assignments). Uses file column for large data
attributes.note: Stored as JSON file in Dataverse file column. Contains full export from Flow 1

attributes.name: cr_migrationstartedby
attributes.description: User who initiated the migration (canvas app user)

attributes.name: cr_migrationstarteddate
attributes.description: Timestamp when user clicked Start Migration in canvas app

attributes.name: cr_operationsetid
attributes.description: GUID of the first OperationSet created in target (returned from msdyn_CreateOperationSetV1)

validationRules.message: Must be a valid GUID format

attributes.name: cr_operationset2id
attributes.description: GUID of the second OperationSet for dependencies and assignments (returned from msdyn_CreateOperationSetV1)

validationRules.message: Must be a valid GUID format

attributes.name: cr_retrycount
attributes.description: Number of times this migration has been retried after failure

attributes.name: cr_notes
attributes.description: Additional notes or comments about the migration

views.name: Active Migrations
views.description: Projects currently being migrated (status = Pending, Exporting, Exported, Importing)

forms.name: Main Form
forms.description: Primary form for viewing and editing migration tracker records

relationships.name: cr_projectmigration_migrations
relationships.description: Relationship to track migrations initiated by users

securityRoles.description: Can view, create, and update project migration trackers
Can view and create project migration trackers, but cannot delete

notes.general: This table is the single source of truth for tracking project migrations. All status updates and error details flow through this table.
notes.fieldsToUpdate: cr_status, cr_errordetails, cr_exportedon, cr_importedon, cr_guidmappingjson, cr_operationsetid, cr_tasksimported
notes.fieldsFromFlow2: cr_targetprojectid, cr_importedon, cr_tasksimported, cr_guidmappingjson, cr_operationsetid, cr_operationset2id

importNotes.purpose: Tracks migration progress, errors, and mappings while reading from source and writing to target
importNotes.replication: After creating in source, you can optionally replicate a read-only view to target for audit purposes
importNotes.databaseSize: Each migration record ~5KB (tracker) + file attachment (JSON export, variable size)
importNotes.estimatedStorage: For 190 projects: ~1MB tracker + ~50-500MB exported data (depends on project complexity)
